mapper.select:
SELECT admin_id as adminId, admin_name as adminName, admin_password as adminPassword, admin_state as adminState, create_time as createTime FROM admin
WHERE admin_name = #{name} AND admin_password = #{password}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin (admin_name, admin_password, admin_state, create_time) VALUES(#{adminName}, #{adminPassword}, 1, now())
mapper.update:
UPDATE admin
admin_name = #{adminName},
admin_password = #{adminPassword},
admin_state = #{adminState},
WHERE admin_id = #{adminId}
